title: Sqlitelogictest wrong results in IN query
poc: CREATE TABLE tab2(col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER);
SELECT * FROM tab2 WHERE + col2 NOT IN ( + - 59 + + ( 76 ), col1, + CAST ( NULL AS INTEGER ), col1, - 19, col1 );
key_bug_features: Incorrect handling of IN query with NULL and negative values
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER, status BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES(1, 10, TRUE), (2, NULL, FALSE), (3, -5, TRUE), (4, 20, NULL);
CREATE TABLE reference_table(ref_id INTEGER, ref_value INTEGER);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value NOT IN (SELECT ref_value FROM reference_table WHERE ref_value IS NOT NULL);
